metadata.citation: Backer JA, Wallinga J. Spatiotemporal Analysis of the 2014 Ebola Epidemic in West Africa. PLOS Computational Biology 12(12): e1005210 (2016).
metadata.outbreak: 2013-2016 West Africa Ebola virus disease outbreak
metadata.alignment_rationale: W12 is the week of 17-23 March 2014, containing the WHO declaration on 2014-03-23. Verified against three anchors: (a) Gueckedou W11=19 cases corresponds to the week of 10-16 March 2014 when ProMED-mail first posted on 13 March 2014; (b) cumulative Gueckedou+Macenta+Kissidougou through W12 = 80 cases approximates Baize 2014 NEJM 'before the end of March 2014 (week 13), a total of 111 clinically suspected cases'; (c) substrate endpoint W74 corresponds to approximately mid-June 2015, consistent with the paper's stated study period 'December 2013 to June 2015'.
